STS1DEPRECATEDTHINGS-MASTER_REALITY.desc: Whenever a card is created during combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
STS1DEPRECATEDTHINGS-REAPER.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL Enemies. Heal HP equal to unblocked damage.
STS1DEPRECATEDTHINGS-REAPER.title: Reaper
STS1DEPRECATEDTHINGS-EXHUME.description: Put a card from your [gold]Exhaust[/gold] pile into your hand.
STS1DEPRECATEDTHINGS-EXHUME.title: Exhume
STS1DEPRECATEDTHINGS-EXHUME.selectionScr: Choose a card to put back in your Hand.
STS1DEPRECATEDTHINGS-OMNISCIENCE.descrip: Choose a card in your draw pile. Play the chosen card twice and [gold]exhaust[/gold] it.
STS1DEPRECATEDTHINGS-OMNISCIENCE.title: Omniscience
STS1DEPRECATEDTHINGS-OMNISCIENCE.selecti: Choose a card to play twice and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
